flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Hampden-Sydney College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($49.5k → $54.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Hampden-Sydney College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($49.5k → $54.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Hampden-Sydney College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Hampden-Sydney College are 28% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($67.6k vs $52.7k).
